answers: Time management golden rule: plan your day the night before. List your top 3 priorities and tackle the hardest one first (eat the frog).
Stop procrastinating: use the 2-minute rule - if it takes less than 2 minutes, do it now. Break big tasks into tiny steps and just start.
Daily routine tip: wake up at the same time daily, time-block your calendar, batch similar tasks, and protect your most productive hours from distractions.
Get organized: use a planner or Notion, declutter your workspace, set deadlines for everything, and review your week every Sunday. Structure = freedom.

feelings.question: how to be more productive
feelings.answer: Daily routine tip: wake up at the same time daily, time-block your calendar, batch similar tasks, and protect your most productive hours from distractions.
